calibration.pick_calibration: Legacy curve: direct name match → round/tier/year curve → fallback
calibration.description: Piecewise power curve: scale * percentile^2.5, offense knee=0.65, IDP knee=0.8. Offense scale=7800, IDP scale=5500. Picks use legacy curve, kickers/punters capped at 600.

display_scale.description: Linear remap of internal calibrated values to 1–9999 public display scale.
